import React from "react"; // ✅ Update these paths to match your assets folder structure import whyBg from "../../../assets/why_section_bg.png"; import iconClapper from "../../../assets/clapper_icon.png"; import iconBolt from "../../../assets/bolt_icon.png"; import iconGlobe from "../../../assets/globe_icon.png"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background */}
{/* Vignette overlay */}
{/* Content */}

Why CineBridge

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Card 1 */}

Public screenings
are complicated

  • › Licensing is unclear
  • › Negotiations are slow
  • › Many venues screen films informally
{/* Card 2 */}

Pay once.
Screen once.

  • › Download licensed film
  • › Screen it one time
  • › Access automatically expires
{/* Card 3 */}

More African films
on more screens

  • › Legal access for venues
  • › Revenue for filmmakers
  • › Cultural visibility globally
Experience the one-time screening model
); } const S = { section: { position: "relative", width: "100%", padding: "64px 0 72px", overflow: "hidden", color: "#fff", }, // ✅ Background (keep as you had it) bg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", filter: "brightness(1.28) contrast(1.08) saturate(1.12)", transform: "scale(1.02)", }, // ✅ Light vignette vignette: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(70% 75% at 50% 28%, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.16) 62%, rgba(0,0,0,0.28) 100%)", zIndex: 1, pointerEvents: "none", }, inner: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1180, margin: "0 auto", padding: "0 22px", textAlign: "center", }, title: { margin: 0, fontSize: 54, lineHeight: 1.06, fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: 0.1, textShadow: "0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.32)", }, subtitle: { margin: "12px auto 0", maxWidth: 760, fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.45, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.72)", textShadow: "0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.32)", }, grid: { marginTop: 34, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))", gap: 22, alignItems: "stretch", }, // ✅ TRUE transparent cards (no dark tint) card: { position: "relative", borderRadius: 10, padding: "28px 28px 24px", background: "transparent", border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.32)", boxShadow: "0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.18), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.10)", backdropFilter: "blur(2px)", WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(px)", overflow: "hidden", minHeight: 330, }, cardHighlight: { background: "transparent", border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.40)", }, cardSheen: { display: "none", // ✅ disable sheen overlay completely }, cardHighlight: { background: "transparent", border: "1px solid rgba(255,170,80,0.40)", }, cardTopGlow: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, height: 2, background: "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,170,80,0), rgba(255,170,80,0.65), rgba(255,170,80,0))", opacity: 0.85, pointerEvents: "none", }, // ✅ only a top highlight (no dark bottom tint) cardSheen: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.07) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 45%, rgba(255,255,255,0.00) 100%)", pointerEvents: "none", opacity: 1, }, cardIcon: { width: 96, height: 96, objectFit: "contain", margin: "0 auto 14px", filter: "drop-shadow(0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.28))", opacity: 0.98, }, cardHeading: { margin: 0, fontSize: 28, lineHeight: 1.2, fontWeight: 700, textShadow: "0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.22)", }, orange: { color: "#F3A12B" }, rule: { height: 1, margin: "18px 0 16px", background: "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,170,80,0), rgba(255,170,80,0.20), rgba(255,170,80,0))", }, list: { listStyle: "none", padding: 0, margin: 0, textAlign: "left", display: "grid", gap: 12, }, li: { display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 12, fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.45, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.76)", }, chev: { color: "#F3A12B", fontWeight: 800, transform: "translateY(2px)", minWidth: 14, }, ctaWrap: { marginTop: 28, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, }, ctaText: { fontSize: 20, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.66)", textShadow: "0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.30)", }, ctaBtn: { display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", gap: 14, padding: "14px 28px", minWidth: 360, borderRadius: 6, border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,55,0.26)", background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #FFAE2B 0%, #CF5A10 100%)", boxShadow: "0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.34)", cursor: "pointer", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 22, lineHeight: 1, textShadow: "0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.34)", }, playTriangle: { width: 0, height: 0, borderTop: "9px solid transparent", borderBottom: "9px solid transparent", borderLeft: "14px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95)", transform: "translateY(1px)", filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.25))", }, ctaLabel: { whiteSpace: "nowrap" }, };
